falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 79% similarity to bottom_2024_aug requires holding above that structural support level

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained volatility spike above 35 contradicts the bottom formation thesis; the August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28 and rapidly declining, so sustained elevation above 35 signals panic continuation rather than capitulation

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40 basis points from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety rally in bonds of that magnitude indicates systemic stress or recession panic, not a cyclical bottom; the August 2024 bottom occurred with yields stable-to-higher as growth fears receded, so a sharp bond rally would falsify the macro stabilization premise

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
